channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: CDF Asim Munir visits frontline troops in Zhob on Eid, vows continued action against terrorism
item.description: Chief of Defence Forces and Chief of the Army Staff Field Marshal Asim Munir spent Eidul Azha with frontline troops stationed in Zhob, Balochistan, according to a statement issued by the Inter-Service...

item.title: Physician questions missing clinical details in Trump’s health reports amid concerns over swelling and fatigue
item.description: A recent analysis of President Donald Trump’s reported health status has raised questions among medical observers after his third hospital visit in 13 months. The visit, described by the White House a...

item.title: Food prices projected to rise due to climate and supply pressures ahead of elections
item.description: The article reports that American consumers may face a new surge in grocery prices driven by a combination of extreme weather, geopolitical tensions, and ongoing trade policy effects. After already ex...

item.title: New Zealand to Introduce AI-Assisted Breast Cancer Screening in 2027
item.description: The New Zealand government has announced plans to introduce artificial intelligence technology into the national breast cancer screening program beginning in early 2027. The AI system will serve as an...

item.title: Scientists Officially Identify New Deep-Sea Octopus Species Near the Galápagos Islands
item.description: Researchers coordinated by Chicago's Field Museum have officially identified and named a new species of deep-sea octopus discovered near the Galápagos Islands. The species, named Microeledone galapage...

item.title: Economic Hardship Makes Ilorin Muslims Buy Eid Rams on Credit with Interest
item.description: Na real matter wey dey happen for Ilorin as economic hardship under Tinubu government don push many Muslim faithful to buy rams for Eid-el-Kabir on credit with added interest. Prices of sacrificial an...

item.title: Kennedy Center executive warns court that removing Trump’s name could threaten fundraising and financial stability
item.description: A senior official at the Kennedy Center has told a federal judge that removing President Donald Trump’s name from the performing arts venue could severely damage its fundraising ability and long-term ...

item.title: Spotify introduces feature to clip and share podcast segments directly from episodes
item.description: Spotify has launched a new feature called Podcast Clips that allows users to easily capture and share specific moments from podcast episodes. The tool, rolling out globally on mobile devices for both ...

item.title: NRSC removes past critical statements about Ken Paxton after Senate primary victory
item.description: Following Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton’s victory over incumbent Senator John Cornyn in the Republican Senate runoff, the National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC) reportedly began removing ...

item.title: Security Crisis and Opposition Weakness Raise Concerns Over Ethiopia’s 2026 Elections
item.description: Ethiopia dey prepare for national election wey go happen on 1 June 2026, but many observers believe say the process no go truly competitive because of political division and serious insecurity across ...

item.title: Emir of Potiskum Calls for Peace, Unity and Support for Farming During Eid-el-Kabir Celebration
item.description: The Emir of Potiskum, Alhaji Umaru Bubaram Ibn Wuriwa Bauya, don advise residents of the emirate and Nigerians generally to continue to embrace peace, unity and peaceful coexistence during the Eid-el-...

item.title: Immigration Expert Links Rising ICE Detention Suicides to Systemic Failures Under Trump Policies
item.description: A report highlighted growing concerns about conditions inside U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) detention facilities during President Donald Trump’s administration. According to an Associ...

item.title: Texas primary and runoff turnout data suggests possible enthusiasm gap ahead of U.S. midterms
item.description: Recent election data from Texas has sparked discussion among political observers about potential implications for the upcoming U.S. midterm elections. In the state’s March primary elections, both Demo...

item.title: Resident doctors in England announce further June strike action amid ongoing pay dispute
item.description: Resident doctors in England have announced another round of industrial action in their ongoing dispute over pay, marking what will be their 16th strike in the long-running disagreement with the Govern...

item.title: Trump administration proposal to restrict international flights to sanctuary cities sparks backlash
item.description: A proposal discussed by Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin during a Fox News interview triggered widespread criticism from legal experts, political commentators, and immigration advocates. M...

item.title: Noah Sebastian remains single and keeps his relationship life private
item.description: This article focuses on the personal life of Noah Sebastian, the lead vocalist, songwriter, and producer of the metal band Bad Omens. Despite public curiosity, Noah is not married and is reportedly si...

item.title: Xiaomi developing Privacy Display-like feature for HyperOS 4 inspired by Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra
item.description: A recent report highlights that Xiaomi is preparing to introduce a privacy-focused screen feature similar to Samsung’s “Privacy Display,” which debuted on the Galaxy S26 Ultra earlier this year. Accor...

item.title: Fox News Reporter Interrupted by Protester During Live Broadcast Outside New Jersey ICE Detention Center
item.description: Fox News correspondent Alexis McAdams was interrupted during a live television broadcast outside the Delaney Hall Detention Center in Newark, New Jersey, where demonstrators had gathered to protest im...

item.title: Opinion Column Argues Ken Paxton’s Senate Primary Victory Reflects GOP’s Ethical Decline
item.description: The article is an opinion piece criticizing Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton after his decisive victory in the Republican Senate primary in Texas. The author portrays Paxton as emblematic of what he ...

item.title: How historic lead mining in northern England created rare metal-tolerant wildflower habitats
item.description: In northern England, former lead mining landscapes have unexpectedly given rise to a rare and fragile ecosystem known as calaminarian grassland. These habitats, found in scattered pockets across uplan...
